case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. VICTOR MIIRABNDA et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: INTEREST CALCUALTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MIIRABNDA, VICTOR $2,819.12 PRINCIPAL, $600.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,054.27 INTEREST, $298.25 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,771.64, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT MIIRABNDA, VICTOR
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5, INCL.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MIIRABNDA, VICTOR DOES 1 TO 5, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-17-2009
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED SEP-30-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MIIRABNDA, VICTOR
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $298.25 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MIIRABNDA, VICTOR
DECLARATION OF FLINT C. ZIDE RE: WAIVER OF INTEREST EXCESS OF 10% FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
DECLARATION CCP 1033 B (1) & (2) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $2,552.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $188.25 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MIIRABNDA, VICTOR
